privacy.notes: This bundle contains roadmap-only synthetic metadata and examples. It intentionally excludes proprietary IHACPA content, licensed data, production payloads, and executable implementation code.

contract_surfaces.label: Arrow-compatible batch input
contract_surfaces.purpose: Define the versioned envelope for ingesting synthetic record batches without embedding business logic.

contract_surfaces.label: Arrow-compatible batch output
contract_surfaces.purpose: Define the versioned envelope for returning synthetic record batches with stable field metadata.

contract_surfaces.label: Diagnostics contract
contract_surfaces.purpose: Define machine-readable warning, error, and informational records for contract validation and boundary checks.

contract_surfaces.label: Provenance contract
contract_surfaces.purpose: Define the required metadata that explains source, transform, and checksum lineage for synthetic artifacts.

contract_surfaces.label: Validation status contract
contract_surfaces.purpose: Define pass, fail, and blocked states for roadmap and fixture verification.

contract_surfaces.label: Binding conformance contract
contract_surfaces.purpose: Define expectations for language bindings that consume or emit the Arrow-compatible contracts.

contract_surfaces.label: ABI boundary contract
contract_surfaces.purpose: Define the descriptive boundary expectations for stable cross-language linking and foreign function interfaces.

contract_surfaces.label: Fixture gate contract
contract_surfaces.purpose: Define which synthetic fixtures are allowed, blocked, or warned at the contract boundary.

rules.label: Explicit versioning is required
rules.description: Every contract surface must declare a version so downstream consumers can pin compatible behavior.

rules.label: Arrow-compatible batch envelopes only
rules.description: Batch input and output examples must describe Arrow-compatible schemas and field metadata without relying on proprietary data.

rules.label: Diagnostics remain machine-readable
rules.description: Diagnostics must expose codes, severities, summaries, and target surfaces in JSON form.

rules.label: Provenance is mandatory
rules.description: Synthetic artifacts must include provenance fields that identify source, transform, checksum, and version lineage.

rules.label: Validation status is explicit
rules.description: Validation results must be reported as pass, fail, or blocked, with reasons stated in diagnostics.

rules.label: Bindings must conform to declared expectations
rules.description: Bindings should document type mapping, ownership, and error translation so callers do not infer hidden conversions.

rules.label: ABI expectations are descriptive only
rules.description: The contract may describe ABI compatibility expectations but must not embed implementation details or executable bridge code.

rules.label: Fixture gates are synthetic only
rules.description: Fixture gates must allow or block synthetic roadmap examples only and must not carry proprietary payloads.

examples.name: validation-pass
examples.description: Synthetic pass example showing Arrow-compatible batch I/O, clean diagnostics, complete provenance, and allowed fixture gates.

examples.name: validation-fail
examples.description: Synthetic fail example showing a contract breach in batch metadata, diagnostics, binding conformance, ABI expectation, and fixture gating.
